items.caption: A moment on the pacific highway near the sawtell road off-ramp at boambee. the highway is a two-lane road with a white line dividing the lanes. on the right side of the road, there's a green and white gas station with a red and white sign. a white van is parked in front of the gas station, and a red car is parked nearby. the background is filled with lush green trees and a blue sky dotted with white clouds. the overall scene suggests a typical day on a highway with vehicles stopping for refueling and rest.
